zh: 具備 3 年以上 SSD 韌體開發經驗，專精於 PCIe 與 NVMe 協定及軟硬體整合 。於 Gap Year 期間深耕 DevOps 與雲端原生技術，包含 Docker、K8s、Terraform 及 CI/CD 自動化流程，目前積極準備並預計於 2026 年上半年取得 CKA (Certified Kubernetes Administrator) 證照，並已成功建構多項實務專案以優化開發工作流 。憑藉深厚的底層邏輯與自主學習能力，目標轉職為軟體工程師，致力於利用系統級開發經驗與現代軟體架構技術，為團隊建構高效且穩定的系統 。。
en: With over 3 years of experience in SSD firmware development , I specialize in PCIe and NVMe protocols as well as hardware-software integration. During my gap year, I have pivoted into DevOps and cloud-native technologies, including Docker, Kubernetes (K8s), Terraform, and CI/CD automation pipelines. I am currently preparing for and expect to obtain the CKA (Certified Kubernetes Administrator) certification in the first half of 2026. Having successfully built multiple practical projects to optimize development workflows, I leverage my strong low-level logic and self-driven learning capabilities to transition into a Software Engineer role. My goal is to utilize my system-level development experience and modern software architecture skills to build efficient and stable systems for the team.

title.zh: SSD 韌體工程師 - 群聯電子
title.en: SSD Firmware Engineer - Phison Electronics Corp

zh: 開發首款 E31 Gen5 SSD controller，設計高效能 SSD 韌體架構，透過系統級優化與硬體整合，確保 Gen5 高速環境下的系統穩定性與吞吐量。
根據需求開發高度客製化功能，具備處理複雜系統間溝通 (Host-to-Device) 與解決跨平台相容性問題的經驗。
執行系統引導序列優化，將啟動與重置延遲最小化，顯著提升系統初始化效率與資源管理效能。
熟練運用 Log 分析、Code Tracing 與撰寫 UEFI Scripts 進行自動化 SoC 驗證與深度排錯（Deep Debugging），具備從複雜系統數據中提取關鍵資訊以驗證系統可靠性的能力。
en: Developed the first E31 Gen5 SSD controller. Architected high-performance SSD firmware, ensuring system stability and throughput in Gen5 environments through low-level hardware-software integration.
Developed customized features to bridge complex host-device communications, resolving cross-platform compatibility issues in large-scale environments.
Optimized system boot sequences to minimize power-on and reset latencies, significantly improving system initialization efficiency and resource orchestration.

Leveraged log analysis, code tracing, and custom UEFI scripts to automate SoC verification and conduct deep-dive troubleshooting, ensuring high system reliability through data-driven diagnostic techniques.

title.zh: 國立臺灣大學 (NTU) - 工程科學與海洋工程研究所 碩士
title.en: National Taiwan University (NTU) - Master of Engineering

zh: 實驗室：計算生醫工程實驗室
論文：結合紋理特徵之多視角殘差選擇核網路應用於肺結節分類
en: Thesis: Multiview residual selective kernel networks for lung nodule classification associated with texture features.

zh: 提出新的 AI 模型架構，並結合紋理特徵，來優化肺結節分類的準確度。
en: Proposed a novel AI model architecture integrating texture feature extraction to optimize lung nodule classification accuracy.

schools.stack: Tech Stack: Python, Pytorch, MATLAB, Deep Learning, Image Processing, Image Classification

title.zh: 國立臺灣師範大學 (NTNU) - 地球科學系 學士
title.en: National Taiwan Normal University (NTNU) - Bachelor of Science

title.zh: Web 框架與其他軟體技能
雲端原生資料驅動履歷系統

desc.zh: 本專案是一個展現 Infrastructure as Code (IaC) 與 GitOps 流程的雲原生應用，使用 Terraform 在 Hetzner Cloud 上自動化部署 K3s 叢集，並透過 GitHub Actions 建立完整的 CI/CD 流水線，實現從程式碼推送、Docker 鏡像構建到 Kubernetes 遠端滾動更新的全自動化流程。系統採用資料驅動架構，將履歷內容與程式碼解耦，並利用 Traefik Ingress 處理生產級流量路由，充分實踐了現代化開發維運的自動化與標準化思維。
desc.en: This project is a cloud-native application demonstrating Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and GitOps workflows, utilizing Terraform to automate K3s cluster deployment on Hetzner Cloud and establishing a full CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions. It automates the entire process from code push and Docker image building to Kubernetes remote rolling updates. By adopting a data-driven architecture that decouples content from code and leveraging Traefik Ingress for production-grade routing, the project showcases a commitment to automation and standardization in modern DevOps practices.

items.stack: Tech Stack: Docker, Terraform, K8s, Hetzner, GitHub Actions, HTML, CSS, JavaScript

title.zh: 每日 AI 自動化財經新聞電子報

desc.zh: 本專案建構了一個全自動化的雲原生財經資訊系統，利用 Docker 將爬蟲、Gemini AI 分析與 Azure TTS 語音合成組件容器化，並部署於 AWS Fargate Serverless 架構以實現高彈性與成本優化。透過 Amazon EventBridge 精準排程與 GitHub Actions 自動化部署，系統每日定時抓取海量數據並產出結構化報告。此外，專案整合了 n8n 自動化工作流進行多平台派送，展現了從資料採集、AI 處理到雲端維運（DevOps）的全棧自動化實作能力。
desc.en: This project features a fully automated cloud-native financial intelligence system that containerizes web scrapers, Gemini AI analysis, and Azure TTS synthesis using Docker, deployed on AWS Fargate to achieve serverless scalability and cost efficiency. By leveraging Amazon EventBridge for precision scheduling and GitHub Actions for automated deployment, the system performs daily data ingestion and generates structured market reports. Additionally, it integrates n8n workflows for multi-channel delivery, demonstrating end-to-end DevOps expertise in AI-driven automation and cloud infrastructure management.

items.stack: Tech Stack: Python, Selenium, BeautifulSoup, Requests, AWS, Docker, n8n, Google Gemini API, Azure AI Speech API

title.zh: 智慧夜生活導航與活動 LINE Bot
title.en: Smart Nightlife Navigator & Event Companion LINE Bot

desc.zh: 本專案開發了一個基於 Webhook 事件驅動架構的智慧社交助手，使用 Python Flask 整合 Line Messaging API 與 Google Maps API，提供動態地理位置搜尋與娛樂互動功能。在 DevOps 實踐上，專案採用 Docker 容器化技術確保開發環境與生產環境的一致性，並部署於 Render PaaS 平台實作輕量化 Serverless 架構。此外，透過 UptimeRobot 實施服務可用性監控，並利用 ngrok 建立本地 Webhook 測試隧道，完整展示了從 API 整合、環境封裝到自動化維運的敏捷開發流程。
desc.en: This project developed an intelligent social assistant based on an event-driven Webhook architecture, integrating Python Flask with Line Messaging API and Google Maps API to provide dynamic location-based search and interactive entertainment features. For DevOps practices, the project employs Docker containerization to ensure consistency between development and production environments and is deployed on the Render PaaS platform using a lightweight Serverless architecture. Additionally, the implementation of availability monitoring via UptimeRobot and local Webhook testing via ngrok demonstrates a complete agile development workflow from API integration and environment encapsulation to automated operations.

items.stack: Tech Stack: Python, Flask, Webhook, Google Maps API, Docker, Render

title.zh: FUSE 使用者空間檔案系統實作

desc.zh: 使用 C++17 模擬經典 Unix 架構（類 EXT2）設計了一個持久性檔案系統。利用 Superblock、Inode Tables 和 Bitmap 分配進行高效的中繼資料管理。使用 std::mutex 和 Monitor Pattern 強制執行執行緒安全，消除競爭條件。
desc.en: Engineered a persistent file system in C++17 simulating classic Unix architecture (EXT2-like). Enforced thread safety for concurrent operations using std::mutex, effectively eliminating race conditions during resource allocation.

items.stack: Tech Stack: C++17, C, Bash, FUSE (libfuse3), POSIX API
